questionHtml: Construct rays, on the diagram, to locate the image of this object formed by the lens. Label this with the letter I.
markschemeHtml:
any two correct rays with extensions ✔

extensions converging to locate an upward virtual image labelled I with position within shaded region around focal point on diagram ✔

meta.title: Construct rays, on the diagram, to locate the image of this object formed by the lens. Label this with the letter I.
